title: spathe simplex
intro: Spathe simplex, also known as Spilanthes acmella, is a tropical plant native to the Americas, characterized by its bright yellow or orange flowers and edible, slightly bitter leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe mouth sores, wounds, and skin irritations. The health benefits of spathe simplex include its ability to stimulate saliva production, which can aid in digestion and relieve symptoms of sore throat and mouth ulcers. Spathe simplex can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in topical applications, such as a mouthwash or salve, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
